creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Could you please boot with the "verbose" option selected from the menu,  
and let us know what the last few lines are pleas?  If you are able to, 
a digital photo of the screen when the machine hangs would be very 
useful. 

Could you also please describe the hardware - what type of machine, etc,  
and whether this cansuccessfully boot previous FreeBSD versions? 

Thanks,
